questions.question: What wire protocol does MCP use for communication between client and server?

What is the first message a client sends during the MCP connection handshake?

Which of the following is a best practice when building MCP servers?

options.A: Accept any input without validation for maximum flexibility
options.B: Return an HTTP 500 status on tool errors
options.C: Return isError: true with a descriptive message rather than crashing on errors
options.D: Use a single tool that handles all operations
